# openapi-spec Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [SpecificationTooling Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-specificationtooling.html): The infrastructure supporting the distribution and validation of the API spec. Architectural overview of the SpecificationTooling domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [SupermodelAPI Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-supermodelapi.html): The primary interface for Supermodel's public services and data extraction endpoints. Architectural overview of the SupermodelAPI domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [package.json — openapi-spec Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/file-package-json.html): Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
